name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 22 Mar 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Improvement","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Payments made with PayPal Checkout and Advanced Credit And Debit Card now contain additional payment details fields in the control panel."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the Google Analytics 4 default script for the Purchase confirmation (thank you page) where apostrophes in a category or brand name would cause the text to truncate."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
